# Menu
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<style>
  @import url('data:text/css,');
  :root {
    --navy: #04386D;
    --red: #AD2124;
    --cream: #FFF8EF;
    --gold: #F5C842;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --dark: #111111;
    --font-display: 'Arial Black', 'Arial Bold', Arial, sans-serif;
    --font-cond: 'Arial Narrow', Arial, sans-serif;
    --font-body: Arial, sans-serif;
  }
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body {
    background: var(--navy);
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    color: var(--white);
    padding: 24px 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .card {
    width: 900px;
    background: var(--cream);
    border-radius: 20px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 5px var(--red), 0 0 0 9px var(--gold);
  }

/* HERO */
.hero {
background: var(–navy);
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
height: 340px;
display: flex;
}
.hero-slash {
position: absolute;
top:0; bottom:0; right:0;
width: 56%;
background: var(–red);
clip-path: polygon(12% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0% 100%);
}
.hero-gold {
position: absolute;
top:0; bottom:0; right:0;
width: 56%;
clip-path: polygon(12% 0, 14.5% 0, 2.5% 100%, 0% 100%);
background: var(–gold);
}
.hero-left {
flex: 0 0 43%;
padding: 36px 0 36px 36px;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
justify-content: center;
gap: 12px;
position: relative;
z-index: 3;
}
.logo-box {
background: var(–red);
border: 3px solid var(–white);
border-radius: 10px;
padding: 7px 20px 5px;
display: inline-block;
width: fit-content;
}
.logo-box span {
font-family: var(–font-display);
font-size: 40px;
letter-spacing: 4px;
color: var(–white);
display: block;
line-height: 1;
font-weight: 900;
}
.hero-eyebrow {
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-size: 11px;
letter-spacing: 5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
font-weight: bold;
}
.hero-title {
font-family: var(–font-display);
font-size: 52px;
line-height: 0.92;
color: var(–white);
letter-spacing: 1px;
font-weight: 900;
}
.hero-title span { color: var(–gold); }
.hero-sub {
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-size: 14px;
letter-spacing: 1px;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
line-height: 1.6;
font-weight: bold;
}
.hero-sub b { color: var(–gold); }
.hero-right {
flex: 1;
position: relative;
z-index: 3;
display: flex;
align-items: flex-end;
justify-content: center;
height: 340px;
}
.combo-hero-img {
width: 115%;
max-width: 530px;
height: 320px;
object-fit: contain;
object-position: center bottom;
display: block;
filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));
}
.hero-wave {
position: absolute;
bottom: -1px; left:0; right:0;
height: 20px;
background: var(–cream);
clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 30%, 75% 100%, 50% 30%, 25% 100%, 0 30%);
z-index: 5;
}

/* PILLS */
.includes {
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
gap: 12px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
padding: 24px 36px 8px;
}
.pill {
background: var(–navy);
color: var(–white);
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 13px;
letter-spacing: 1px;
text-transform: uppercase;
padding: 9px 18px;
border-radius: 50px;
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 8px;
}
.pill .num {
background: var(–red);
color: #fff;
font-size: 11px;
font-weight: 900;
width: 20px; height: 20px;
border-radius: 50%;
display: inline-flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
}
.divider-label {
text-align: center;
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10px;
letter-spacing: 5px;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(–red);
margin-top: 6px;
padding-bottom: 2px;
}

/* BODY */
.body { padding: 6px 36px 34px; color: var(–dark); }
.section-header {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
margin: 22px 0 12px;
}
.section-header .bar { flex:1; height:2px; background: rgba(4,56,109,0.14); }
.section-title {
font-family: var(–font-display);
font-size: 20px;
letter-spacing: 2px;
color: var(–navy);
font-weight: 900;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.section-badge {
background: var(–navy);
color: var(–gold);
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10px;
letter-spacing: 2px;
padding: 3px 9px;
border-radius: 4px;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* SLIDER GRID */
.slider-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
gap: 10px;
}
.slider-card {
background: var(–white);
border: 2px solid rgba(4,56,109,0.08);
border-radius: 12px;
overflow: hidden;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
}
.slider-img {
width: 100%;
height: 148px;
object-fit: cover;
object-position: center top;
display: block;
background: #f5f5f5;
}
.slider-info { padding: 10px 12px 12px; flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px; }
.slider-type {
display: inline-block;
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 9px;
letter-spacing: 1px;
text-transform: uppercase;
padding: 2px 7px;
border-radius: 4px;
width: fit-content;
margin-bottom: 2px;
}
.beef { background: rgba(4,56,109,0.1); color: var(–navy); }
.chicken { background: rgba(245,200,66,0.25); color: #7a5800; }
.slider-name {
font-family: var(–font-display);
font-weight: 900;
font-size: 13px;
color: var(–navy);
line-height: 1.2;
}
.slider-desc { font-size: 10px; color: #666; line-height: 1.4; }

/* EXTRAS */
.extras-row {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
gap: 12px;
margin-top: 8px;
}
.extras-box {
background: var(–white);
border: 2px solid rgba(4,56,109,0.08);
border-radius: 12px;
padding: 15px;
}
.extras-box-title {
font-family: var(–font-display);
font-weight: 900;
font-size: 13px;
letter-spacing: 1px;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(–red);
margin-bottom: 11px;
}
.fries-img {
width: 100%;
height: 160px;
object-fit: contain;
object-position: center;
display: block;
border-radius: 9px;
background: #f9f5f0;
}
.fries-label {
text-align: center;
margin-top: 7px;
font-family: var(–font-display);
font-weight: 900;
font-size: 13px;
color: var(–navy);
letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.drinks-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
gap: 7px;
}
.drink-item {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
gap: 5px;
padding: 7px 3px 9px;
border-radius: 9px;
background: #f9f9f9;
border: 1.5px solid rgba(4,56,109,0.07);
}
.drink-img {
width: 44px;
height: 68px;
object-fit: contain;
display: block;
}
.drink-name {
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 10px;
color: var(–dark);
text-align: center;
line-height: 1.2;
}

/* FOOTER */
.footer {
background: var(–navy);
padding: 16px 36px;
text-align: center;
}
.footer-text {
font-family: var(–font-cond);
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 12px;
letter-spacing: 3px;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
}
.footer-highlight { color: var(–gold); }
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div class="card">

  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-slash"></div>
    <div class="hero-gold"></div>
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="logo-box"><span>PATTIE</span><span>PATTIE</span></div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">✦ Introducing the ✦</div>
      <div class="hero-title">THE<br><span>COMBO</span><br>DEAL</div>
      <div class="hero-sub">
        <b>2 Sliders</b> of Your Choice<br>
        <b>+</b> French Fries &nbsp;<b>+</b>&nbsp; Soft Drink
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="combo-hero-img" alt="Combo Meal">
    </div>
    <div class="hero-wave"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="includes">
    <div class="pill"><span class="num">2</span> 🍔 Sliders of Your Choice</div>
    <div class="pill">🍟 French Fries</div>
    <div class="pill">🥤 Soft Drink of Your Choice</div>
  </div>
  <div class="divider-label">— Mix &amp; match from the menu below —</div>

  <div class="body">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="bar"></div>
      <div class="section-title">🐄 BEEF SLIDERS</div>
      <div class="section-badge">Smash Patties</div>
      <div class="bar"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="slider-grid">
      <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="CLASSIC"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type beef">Beef</span><div class="slider-name">Classic Pattie Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">2 smashed beef patties, american cheese, diced onions, ketchup &amp; mustard</div></div></div>
      <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="PATTIE"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type beef">Beef</span><div class="slider-name">Pattie Pattie Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">2 smashed beef patties, american cheese, lettuce, diced onions, pickles &amp; signature sauce</div></div></div>
      <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="CHEESESTEAK"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type beef">Beef</span><div class="slider-name">Cheesesteak Pattie Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">2 smashed beef patties, steak seasoning, mustard onion, paperjack cheese &amp; steak sauce</div></div></div>
      <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="RODEOBEEF"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type beef">Beef</span><div class="slider-name">Rodeo Beef Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">Two juicy beef patties, crispy onion ring, melted cheese &amp; Rodeo sauce</div></div></div>
      <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="SWEETBACON"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type beef">Beef</span><div class="slider-name">Sweet Bacon Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">2 smashed beef patties, american cheese, sweet bacon &amp; signature Pattie Pattie sauce</div></div></div>
      <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="TRUFFLE"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type beef">Beef</span><div class="slider-name">Truffle Mushroom Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">2 smashed beef patties, crispy mushroom, pepperjack cheese &amp; truffle sauce</div></div></div>
    </div>

```
<div class="section-header">
  <div class="bar"></div>
  <div class="section-title">🍗 CHICKEN SLIDERS</div>
  <div class="section-badge">Crispy &amp; Bold</div>
  <div class="bar"></div>
</div>
<div class="slider-grid">
  <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="CRISPY"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type chicken">Chicken</span><div class="slider-name">Crispy Chicken Pattie Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">Fried chicken pattie, american cheese, lettuce, pickles &amp; mayo</div></div></div>
  <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="SPICY"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type chicken">Chicken</span><div class="slider-name">Spicy Chicken Pattie Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">Fried chicken pattie, american cheese, slaw &amp; spicy buffalo sauce</div></div></div>
  <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="NASHVILLE"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type chicken">Chicken</span><div class="slider-name">Nashville Chicken Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">Crispy chicken with Nashville hot seasoning — bold, smoky &amp; fiery</div></div></div>
  <div class="slider-card"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="slider-img" alt="RODEOCHICKEN"><div class="slider-info"><span class="slider-type chicken">Chicken</span><div class="slider-name">Rodeo Chicken Slider</div><div class="slider-desc">Crispy golden chicken, crunchy onion ring, melted cheese &amp; Rodeo sauce</div></div></div>
</div>

<div class="section-header">
  <div class="bar"></div>
  <div class="section-title">✦ SIDES &amp; DRINKS</div>
  <div class="bar"></div>
</div>
<div class="extras-row">
  <div class="extras-box">
    <div class="extras-box-title">🍟 Your Side</div>
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="fries-img" alt="FRIES">
    <div class="fries-label">French Fries</div>
  </div>
  <div class="extras-box">
    <div class="extras-box-title">🥤 Your Drink</div>
    <div class="drinks-grid">
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="PEPSI"><div class="drink-name">Pepsi</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="PEPSIZERO"><div class="drink-name">Pepsi Zero</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="MIRINDA"><div class="drink-name">Mirinda</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="SEVENUP"><div class="drink-name">7Up</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="MNTDEW"><div class="drink-name">Mountain Dew</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="SHANI"><div class="drink-name">Shani</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="KINZACOLA"><div class="drink-name">Kinza Cola</div></div>
      <div class="drink-item"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="drink-img" alt="KINZALEMON"><div class="drink-name">Kinza Lemon</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <div class="footer-text">
      <span class="footer-highlight">Pattie Pattie</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Smash. Stack. Devour. &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span class="footer-highlight">Kuwait</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
</body>
</html>
